words.note: 강세: 둘째 음절 (ca-REER) — 한국어 '커리어'와 달리 뒤에 강세!
words.ex: She built a successful career in engineering.

words.note: 강세: 첫째 음절 (COU-ri-er) — career와 강세 정반대! 청해 단골 함정
words.ex: The package was delivered by a courier this morning.
words.exKo: 그 소포는 오늘 아침 택배원이 배달했다.

words.ex: Give my regards to your family.

words.note: 강세: COV-er LET-ter (두 단어 모두 첫음절)
words.ex: Please attach your cover letter with your resume.
I sent my resume to three companies.
Could you look over my essay before I submit it?
words.exKo: 제출하기 전에 제 에세이를 검토해 주실래요?

words.note: 청해 빈출 조합: 'look it over for any errors'
words.ex: Please check the document for any errors.
"Is there a problem?" "Not that I'm aware of."

words.note: look over vs look through: over는 가볍게, through는 자세히
words.ex: I looked through all the files but couldn't find it.
words.exKo: 모든 파일을 살펴봤지만 찾을 수 없었다.

words.ex: Have you heard the news yet?
